statement: The current PSPF is the 2025 Annual Release (published 24 July 2025), which newly adds policy content on AI, quantum and connected peripherals and embeds Zero Trust.

evidence.quote: PSPF 2025 embeds Zero Trust principles... introduces new policy content on AI, quantum computing, and connected peripheral technologies

falsifier: A protectivesecurity.gov.au 'PSPF Annual Release 2026' superseding the 2025 release at retrieval would falsify 'current'.
